summary: Iteration 28 — Cleanup verification + E2E pipeline test. All dead code removal items confirmed (SYSTEM_ICONS, warRoomEndRef, buildDialog, server.py stub). Backend: 11/11 tests pass. /api/systems/open-world returns list of 15 systems correctly. War Room API works with persistence. Frontend E2E: Chat sends message, COMMANDER responds, pipeline Phase 1 (NEXUS) auto-triggers. War Room shows persisted messages. Find & Replace dialog opens correctly. Full Phase 2 parallel War Room messages not observeable in automated testing due to browser-driven pipeline (~5-10min duration).

integration_issues.flow: Full pipeline Phase 2 War Room messages
integration_issues.issue: Pipeline runs client-side in browser. When Playwright browser session closes mid-pipeline, execution stops. Could not verify Phase 2 parallel agent 'Completed parallel task' messages in War Room via automated test because full pipeline takes 5-10 minutes. API works correctly (POST/GET confirmed), code logic (executeDelegationSilent posting war room messages) is intact.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - not a bug, design observation

action_items: INFO: Full Phase 2 pipeline with parallel War Room messages requires manual testing in a real browser (keep browser open 5-10 min). Cannot be fully automated in Playwright due to session duration constraints.
INFO: Pipeline is browser-driven (client-side SSE). If user closes browser mid-pipeline, pipeline stops. Consider server-side pipeline persistence as a future enhancement.
LOW: The sci-fi pipeline triggered during testing only reached NEXUS phase before browser closed. This left a 'dangling' pipeline state - not a bug, just testing artifact.
critical_code_review_comments: CLEANUP VERIFIED: All 4 cleanup items removed correctly. SYSTEM_ICONS moved to WorkspaceDialogs.jsx only. warRoomEndRef and buildDialog fully removed. server.py stub replaced with comment.
VERIFIED: /api/systems/open-world returns list (not dict). build_operations.py line 276: return list(OPEN_WORLD_SYSTEMS.values()) ✓
VERIFIED: War Room API POST /api/war-room/message and GET /api/war-room/{project_id} both working correctly with persistence.
VERIFIED: executeDelegationSilent() correctly posts war-room message after parallel task (line 686-698 of ProjectWorkspace.jsx).
NOTE: Pipeline runs entirely client-side in React (SSE streams). No server-side pipeline state persistence. If browser closes mid-run, pipeline stops.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all cleanup verified, Chat/COMMANDER/Phase1 working, War Room persistence confirmed; Phase2 parallel War Room messages not observable in 5-10min automated session)

seed_data_creation: 4 war room messages created during backend tests: TEST_v51 FORGE messages and PERSIST_TEST SENTINEL messages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All cleanup items fully verified. Backend 11/11 passing. War Room API works. Pipeline Phase 1 (COMMANDER → NEXUS → ATLAS) confirmed working via DB messages. Phase 2 parallel agents post War Room messages via executeDelegationSilent — confirmed in code/API but not observed in automated testing (5-10min pipeline). Find & Replace dialog working. War Room badge='6' persists after page refresh. ProjectWorkspace.jsx=1519 lines. Next agent: if testing War Room Phase 2 messages, either manually trigger and wait 10+ minutes, or check the DB directly after a full pipeline run.
